mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, BOARD_NAME AS boardName, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, ADMIN_ID AS adminId, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}

SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, BOARD_NAME AS boardName, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, ADMIN_ID AS adminId, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BOARD ORDER BY BOARD_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_BOARD (BOARD_ID, BOARD_NAME, BOARD_TYPE, ADMIN_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) VALUES (#{dto.boardId}, #{dto.boardName}, #{dto.boardType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.adminId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_BOARD SET BOARD_NAME = #{dto.boardName}, BOARD_TYPE = #{dto.boardType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADMIN_ID = #{dto.adminId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, BOARD_NAME AS boardName, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, ADMIN_ID AS adminId, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BOARD WHERE BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType} ORDER BY BOARD_ID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.boardId) AS RN FROM ( SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, BOARD_NAME AS boardName, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, ADMIN_ID AS adminId, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BOARD ) A ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{limit} ORDER BY RN
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_BOARD

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ${orderColumn} ${orderDir}, boardId ASC) AS RN FROM ( SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, BOARD_NAME AS boardName, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, ADMIN_ID AS adminId, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BOARD
) A ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{limit} ORDER BY RN
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_BOARD

SELECT USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, AUTH_CODE AS authCode, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BOARD_AUTH WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, AUTH_CODE AS authCode, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BOARD_AUTH ORDER BY BOARD_ID, USER_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_BOARD_AUTH (USER_ID, BOARD_ID, AUTH_CODE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) VALUES (#{userId}, #{boardId}, #{authCode}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_BOARD_AUTH WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, AUTH_CODE AS authCode, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BOARD_AUTH WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY BOARD_ID

SELECT USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, AUTH_CODE AS authCode, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BOARD_AUTH WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY USER_ID
SELECT AUTH_CODE FROM FWK_BOARD_AUTH WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_BOARD_AUTH WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_ID = #{boardId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.${orderColumn} ${orderDir}, A.boardId ASC, A.userId ASC) AS RN FROM ( SELECT ba.USER_ID AS userId, ba.BOARD_ID AS boardId, ba.AUTH_CODE AS authCode, ba.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, ba.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_BOARD_AUTH ba LEFT JOIN FWK_USER u ON ba.USER_ID = u.USER_ID
) A ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{limit} ORDER BY RN
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_BOARD_AUTH ba LEFT JOIN FWK_USER u ON ba.USER_ID = u.USER_ID
SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, CATEGORY_SEQ AS categorySeq, CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName FROM FWK_BOARD_CATEGORY WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND CATEGORY_SEQ = #{categorySeq}
SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, CATEGORY_SEQ AS categorySeq, CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName FROM FWK_BOARD_CATEGORY ORDER BY BOARD_ID, CATEGORY_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_BOARD_CATEGORY (BOARD_ID, CATEGORY_SEQ, CATEGORY_NAME) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{categorySeq}, #{categoryName})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_BOARD_CATEGORY WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND CATEGORY_SEQ = #{categorySeq}
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, CATEGORY_SEQ AS categorySeq, CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName FROM FWK_BOARD_CATEGORY WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY CATEGORY_SEQ
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_BOARD_CATEGORY WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
